Perfectionism.description: They are incapable of doing a 'rush job.'

Hive-Echo.description: They operate on a low-level pheromonal 'Hive-Net.'

Philosophy of 'The One Piece'.description: They believe that a structure is only strong if it is continuous.

Smell of Pine/Citrus.description: They communicate emotion through scent, with a smell of pine/citrus indicating happiness/agreement.

Smell of Vinegar/Acid.description: They communicate emotion through scent, with a smell of vinegar/acid indicating anger/aggressive.

Smell of Burnt Sugar.description: They communicate emotion through scent, with a smell of burnt sugar indicating panic/danger.

Antennae-Tap.description: To show affection or deep trust, they gently touch antennae with another being.

Culture.Description: They are a culture of master craftsmen, prioritizing the creation of intricate wooden structures and instruments.

Industrial Role.Description: They create 'Void-Lutes,' 'Ghost-Cellos,' and other intricate instruments, as well as precision joinery and puzzle-boxes.

Military Role.Description: They are skilled in siege engineering and anti-structure tactics, using their mandibles and acid to dismantle enemy defenses.

Diet.Description: They consume 'Honeydew' and massive amounts of wood-pulp, which they digest with specialized gut bacteria.
